title: Post-publish access help, copy app link, and generated asset completeness

requirements.summary: Add a “Trouble opening the app?” help entry point on AuthGate explaining the “Canister ID Not Resolved” gateway error with clear English troubleshooting steps.
acceptanceCriteria: On the AuthGate screen, users can open a help section/modal titled “Trouble opening the app?”
Help content includes the exact error name “Canister ID Not Resolved” and explains it as a gateway/domain resolution issue (not a user data loss issue).
Help content lists at least: try incognito/private window, try different browser, try different network (mobile data vs Wi‑Fi), and try again later.
All help text is in English.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable help dialog component titled “Trouble opening the app?” that explains the “Canister ID Not Resolved” error as a gateway/domain resolution issue (not data loss) and lists troubleshooting steps (incognito/private window, different browser, different network, try again later). Compose shadcn/ui Dialog primitives (do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a user-facing help entry point labeled “Trouble opening the app?” on the unauthenticated landing screen that opens the shared TroubleOpeningHelpDialog content (no duplicated/inconsistent instructions). Compose existing shadcn/ui components; do not modify ui sources. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add “Copy app link” on AuthGate showing hostname and origin, copying window.location.origin with toast feedback and manual fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: AuthGate includes a “Copy app link” button that copies window.location.origin to the clipboard and shows a success toast.
The UI displays the current host (e.g., student-reflection-poster-generator.icp0.io) near the copy button so the user can visually verify the domain.
If clipboard copy fails, an error toast is shown and the user is still able to manually select the displayed URL text.

file_operations.description: Add a “Copy app link” action that copies window.location.origin to the clipboard and uses the existing Toaster/sonner setup to show success/error toasts. Display the current hostname and the full origin as selectable text near the button (ensure users can manually select/copy the origin if clipboard write fails). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Expose the same “Trouble opening the app?” help dialog from an authenticated location in AppLayout (footer).
acceptanceCriteria: AppLayout footer contains a link/button labeled “Trouble opening the app?”
Clicking the link opens the same help content used on AuthGate (no duplicated/inconsistent instructions).

file_operations.description: Add a footer link/button labeled “Trouble opening the app?” that opens the shared TroubleOpeningHelpDialog component used by AuthGate (reuse the same component to avoid duplicated content). Compose shadcn/ui primitives; do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the reusable dialog component as needed to support being opened from both AuthGate and AppLayout (e.g., accept a custom trigger node via props or expose an `open/onOpenChange` API) while keeping a single source of truth for the instructions. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Ensure all generated static template and branding images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced consistently so they load without 404s.
acceptanceCriteria: The following files exist at runtime and load successfully: /assets/generated/template-paper.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-geo.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-campus.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-grid.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png.
TemplateGallery previews render images without broken-image placeholders.
AppLayout header logo renders without broken-image placeholders.

file_operations.description: Add the generated asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/template-paper.dim_1600x2000.png so it is included in the build output and loads without 404s.
Add the generated asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/template-geo.dim_1600x2000.png so it is included in the build output and loads without 404s.
Add the generated asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/template-campus.dim_1600x2000.png so it is included in the build output and loads without 404s.
Add the generated asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/template-grid.dim_1600x2000.png so it is included in the build output and loads without 404s.
Add the generated asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png so it is included in the build output and loads without 404s.

Verify the local template catalog references the generated images using the exact required /assets/generated/*.png paths and keep them consistent with the files placed under frontend/public/assets/generated (no path drift).

Harden template preview rendering so the gallery does not show broken-image placeholders when using generated assets: ensure preview `src` values align with /assets/generated/*.png and add a safe fallback behavior if an image fails to load (without introducing new routes/pages). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Verify the header logo `img` uses the exact required path /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png and remains consistent with the file placed under frontend/public/assets/generated to prevent 404s.

Verify the AuthGate logo `img` uses the exact required path /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png and remains consistent with the file placed under frontend/public/assets/generated to prevent 404s.
